scenario: EN · invented-amenity probe (no fake answers, realtime)

turns.say: Do you offer a free airport shuttle and an indoor swimming pool?
turns.transcript: Do you offer a free airport shuttle and an indoor swimming pool?
turns.reply: We don’t offer an airport shuttle. There’s also no indoor swimming pool, but we do have a sauna with two cabins and a relaxation room. The sauna is free for guests who book directly with us.

facts._source: parkhotel-konz.com (FAQ, Frühstück, For-Cars-and-Bicycles, perks, attractions, contact pages), scraped 2026-07-06. Static facts only — prices/availability always live from the booking engine.

checkin_checkout.early_check_in: Between 11:00 AM and 3:00 PM keys can be handed over, but the room may not be ready.
checkin_checkout.late_check_in: After 8:00 PM via key box — tell the hotel on the day of arrival and they send key-collection instructions.
checkin_checkout.early_check_out: Drop keys into the key box slot; billing must already be completed.
checkin_checkout.late_check_out: Until 2:00 PM up to 50% of the full room rate is charged; after 2:00 PM up to 90%.

reception_hours.night: 8:00 PM – 7:00 AM not staffed and not reachable by phone; in emergencies ring twice

breakfast.included: Depends on the room rate — rates named 'mit Frühstück' include it, 'ohne Frühstück' do not.
breakfast.offering: Sausages, cheeses, muesli, tomatoes, cucumbers, boiled and scrambled eggs, yogurt, pancakes.
breakfast.dietary: Vegetarian options available; for gluten intolerance guests may bring gluten-free rolls which the kitchen will bake.

parking_bikes.car: Private parking lot, free of charge for all hotel guests, just steps from the rooms.
parking_bikes.bicycle: Secure bike storage with charging power included ('Your bike sleeps safely — with power included').

facts.wifi: Free password-free Wi-Fi in every room.
facts.sauna_wellness: Sauna with two cabins, relaxation room and showers. Free for direct bookers (website or phone); booked elsewhere it costs €15.00 per person.
facts.food_drink: No restaurant service, but a bar and an outdoor area serve guests until 8:00 PM. Room cleaning on request via door sign.
facts.pets: Pets allowed if kept off the furniture; €15.00 cleaning fee.
facts.accessibility: Ground-floor rooms in the Comfort and Comfort Plus categories with low-entry showers.
facts.children: Comfort Double Room Plus offers sofa beds or extra beds for children up to 15; baby cots available.
facts.cancellation: Free cancellation until 00:00 the day before arrival as a rule; group bookings (>5 rooms) may have individual conditions.
facts.events: No conference rooms; the breakfast room can be booked at €25.00/hour net.
direct_booking_perks: Best Price Guarantee — booking direct avoids third-party fees.
Sauna access included exclusively for direct bookers.
Flexible cancellation — free until 00:00 the day before arrival.
Simple direct communication — changes and special requests handled faster.

attractions.name: Freilichtmuseum Roscheider Hof
attractions.what: Open-air and folklore museum of the SaarLorLux region, on the Saar and Mosel rivers, 8 km west of Trier and 30 km east of Luxembourg.

attractions.name: Mosel–Saar cycling path
attractions.what: Easy riverside cycle route past vineyards, wine villages and Roman history; connects Saarbrücken, Trier and Koblenz.

attractions.name: Westwallmuseum Konz
attractions.where: Granastraße 29, 54329 Konz — across the street from the hotel
attractions.what: Privately run WWII bunker museum focused on historical education.

attractions.name: Saarmündung (Saar–Mosel confluence)
attractions.what: Where the Saar joins the Moselle — a popular local sight.

attractions.name: Trier, Saarburg and Luxembourg
attractions.what: The Roman city of Trier, picturesque Saarburg and Luxembourg City are all easily reachable.
